candidate_rules: include sources whose accepted distance interval overlaps the 1000 ly public boundary
include the deterministic 1250 ly acquisition buffer
do not use a distance estimate as an identity replacement

storage_budgets.policy: Budgets are gates, not reservations; stop before a write that would breach the applicable free-space floor.

authority_domains.inventory: physical object existence and source release membership
authority_domains.astrometry: position, parallax, proper motion, and radial velocity
authority_domains.naming: alias, designation, scope, and preferred-name evidence
authority_domains.stellar_parameters: temperature, gravity, composition, radius, luminosity, mass, and age
authority_domains.classification: stellar, compact-object, variability, and evolutionary classification
authority_domains.multiplicity: component relations, system membership, and orbit evidence
authority_domains.cluster: cluster identity, physical context, and membership claims
authority_domains.extended_objects: non-stellar object identity, geometry, and distance
authority_domains.observation_products: spectra, light curves, atmosphere spectra, images, and product metadata

sources.frame_epoch: Gaia DR2 ICRS J2015.5 to Gaia DR3 ICRS J2016.0
Gaia DR2 ICRS J2015.5 to Gaia DR3 ICRS J2016.0

sources.publisher: NASA Exoplanet Archive, MAST, and ESA Gaia

null_limit_semantics.blank_component: two-object pair or source does not supply an additional multiple-system component designation
null_limit_semantics.spectral_type: opaque source string may describe component A or two components and must not be split without a source-governed parser
null_limit_semantics.proper_motion: source integers are arcseconds per 1000 years except note-code P rows, which use 100 years
null_limit_semantics.relation_flags: T/V/Z support physical association; S/U/Y oppose it; I/X are uncertain or dubious, but no physical endpoint relation is emitted until pair labels are source-governed

sources.publisher: CDS XMatch over WDS and Gaia DR3
sources.frame_epoch: J2000 source positions and Gaia DR3

null_limit_semantics.match_statistic: angDist is center-position angular separation in arcseconds, not a probability
null_limit_semantics.selection: CDS best angular match within 2 arcseconds; candidate evidence only and never accepted identity by itself

retrieval.contract: vizier:B/wds/wds to vizier:I/355/gaiadr3, selection=best, distMaxArcsec=2.0, all sky

null_limit_semantics.numeric_zero: unknown in every MSC table per the release ReadMe
null_limit_semantics.relation_status: Type X is negative; question-mark and lowercase-c status is ambiguous; remaining source pair claims are positive evidence only

sources.publisher: IAU Working Group on Star Names
sources.cadence: continuously updated; Spacegate pins dated snapshots
published catalog updates; Spacegate pins dated snapshots

retrieval.scope: Gaia DR3 bridge followed by local envelope intersection and targeted evidence acquisition
